prediction.reasoning: Based on AVGO's historical volatility of approximately 35-40% annually (roughly 2.2-2.5% daily), I estimated a 6-day price movement using a geometric Brownian motion model. The point estimate assumes a slight positive drift typical of large-cap tech stocks. Confidence intervals are based on standard normal distribution assumptions with daily volatility of ~2.3%, scaled for 6 days. AVGO has shown relative stability as a large semiconductor company, but tech sector volatility and market conditions create uncertainty ranges of roughly ±2% (50% CI) to ±6% (90% CI) around the current price.
